query: light leak halation orange red film overexposed analog
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: light leaks, halation, overexposed film

response.objective_caption: A rectangular image bordered by a thin magenta-pink line, containing two diagonal streaks of magenta-pink luminous bands against a dark near-black background, oriented from upper left to lower right with slight curvature.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract image with two diagonal, softly blurred streaks of magenta-pink light bleeding across a suffocating dark background, the hues clashing against the void in a faded, low-contrast composition that feels oppressive and emotionally detached, deliberately stripped of recognizable subject matter.
